message:
perf,refactor: optimize allocations and refactor entry patterns

Admin state:
- Refactor connector_state_mut() from entry().or_default() to
  explicit contains_key() + insert() + get_mut() for defensive bounds
- Remove consolidated async integration tests (migrated to
  host_connector_integration.rs)

Sandbox:
- Pre-allocate BPF filter vec with exact capacity based on allowlist
  size to avoid reallocation during filter construction

Telemetry:
- Refactor usage store aggregation to explicit get_mut + insert
- Update test data naming for determinism (fcp.z→fcp.zzz, fcp.a→fcp.aaa)
- Fix test data: ZoneId::private() → ZoneId::work(), forbidden: 5 → 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
